claimText: The IUCN Species Survival Commission (SSC) was established in 1949 and operates as a science-based network of volunteer experts.
evidenceExcerpt: Established in 1949, it is a science-based network of more than 10,500 volunteer experts.
examUse: Statement-based question on the origin and composition of the IUCN SSC.
distractorHooks: Composed of government representatives rather than volunteer experts

claimText: Indian wildlife conservationist Vivek Menon was elected as the Chair of the IUCN Species Survival Commission for the 2025-2029 term.
evidenceExcerpt: India's renowned wildlife conservationist, Vivek Menon, has been elected as the new Chair of the IUCN Species Survival Commission (SSC) for the 2025-2029.
examUse: Current affairs statement in a multi-statement question regarding Indian representation in global environmental bodies.
distractorHooks: Elected as the head of UNEP
Another prominent Indian conservationist like Ramesh Agrawal

claimText: The role of the IUCN Species Survival Commission is to provide information to the IUCN regarding biodiversity conservation, species value, and ecosystem health.
evidenceExcerpt: Role: To provide information to IUCN on biodiversity conservation, the inherent value of species, their role in ecosystem health and functioning, etc.
examUse: Statement-based question testing the specific mandate and function of the IUCN SSC.
distractorHooks: Directly funds and executes grassroots conservation projects
